/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/Test_ncurses.dir/Test_ncurses.cc.o  -o ../../output/debug/bin/Test_ncurses   -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./lib/debug  -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./lib/release  -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./output/debug/lib  -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./output/release/lib  -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./output/debug/lib/ncurses  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./lib/debug:/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./lib/release:/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./output/debug/lib:/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./output/release/lib:/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/project_manager/./output/debug/lib/ncurses -lproject_manager -lgmock -lgmock_main -lgtest -lgtest_main -lpthread -ldata_structure -lsystem_util -lprotocol -lmessage -lbuffer -lncurses
